text:
Taiwan Strait Situation

Chinese Nationalist officials are making every effort to offset the effects of Communist China's cease-fire offer. [ ]

Chiang Kai-shek told British newsmen on 6 October that the Warsaw talks should be broken off to test Peiping's reaction. A Nationalist military spokesman publicly dismissed the Communist offer to suspend shelling for a week as "purely international propaganda."
